Prospecting & Research Workspace

Explore a sector → capture companies → research & enrich · Nairobi
How to use: name a brand or sector in chat (e.g. “Krackles” or “the paint industry”) → I suggest companies to chase → add them here → open each, use the LinkedIn / Google buttons to find the decision-maker, and paste contacts back in. Watch the coverage map fill in as you work through every sector.

Nothing here yet. Click + Add company, Import CSV, or ask me in chat for companies in a sector.

Open Prospect

Research brief

Quick prep drafted from this record — likely needs, qualifying questions, outreach hook. Use the buttons below to research the actual decision-maker, then paste contacts into the company.
—

Import from CSV

Paste the CSV from Claude (a code fence is fine) or choose the downloaded .csv file. Recognised columns:
name, industry, segment, list_group, stage, role, contact_name, contact_title, email, phone, source, notes

Breakdown

Edit email / phone

Archive prospect

Email templates

Write your own intro emails. Use {first}, {name}, {company} as placeholders. The category template is used when you email a prospect in that category; Default applies when there's no category-specific one. Include your own sign-off — your template is used exactly as written. (Categories you leave blank fall back to the built-in templates.)

📇 Choose recipients

Pick who, then either blast personalised drafts (using your product template) OR export them to a CSV to import into Outlook as a Contact Group and send once with an attachment.
0 recipients

📋 Bcc list

In Outlook: click Bcc, paste (Ctrl+V), then write one email and attach your file. Note: a very large Bcc may exceed your mail server's per-message recipient limit — if it bounces, split it into a few sends.

Duplicate prospects

Research funnel

Find Contacts

Email outcome

Remove bounced emails

Paste the email addresses that bounced — one per line, or separated by commas. They'll be removed from every prospect record (primary, extra and general). If a prospect's only direct email bounced, the next one on file is promoted automatically.

Confirm contact details

Read from the screenshot — check and edit before saving.

Call outcome
